title: Paleo Fried Ripe Bananas with Deglaze
description: A savory, dense Italian-Sicilian-inspired dish featuring fried ripe bananas in a paleo-friendly deglaze method.

ingredients.name: ripe banana
ingredients.notes: Choose ripe bananas for best flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: paleo-friendly breadcrumbs
ingredients.notes: Available at many health food stores or online, typically labeled as 'nut-free'

ingredients.name: ground flaxseed
ingredients.notes: To thicken the batter and prevent it from being too runny

ingredients.name: paleo-friendly yogurt or cream cheese
ingredients.notes: To replace milk in egg-leavened recipes, if needed

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Slice ripe bananas lengthwise and remove the seeds.
In a small bowl, mix ground flaxseed with water until smooth. Set aside.
Dip banana slices in paleo-friendly flour first, then into paleo-friendly breadcrumbs, coating evenly on both sides.

Heat coconut oil in a deep fryer to 350°F (175°C). Carefully place coated bananas in the hot oil and fry for about 2-3 minutes until golden brown. Remove from heat and place on paper towels to drain excess grease.
In a saucepan, deglaze with paleo-friendly yogurt or cream cheese over medium heat. Stir continuously until mixture thickens slightly but is still pourable (about 1 minute).
Serve banana slices in the deglazed sauce for added flavor and texture.
